_comment: Copy this to data/metrics.config.local.json (gitignored) and fill in. Powers tools/metrics-collect.mjs. Env vars METRICS_<KEY> override these. Every project wires its own DB query + data sources; the board's Metrics tab renders whatever metrics.json the collector produces.
sshHostkey: ssh-ed25519 255 SHA256:... (plink -hostkey fingerprint of your prod host)
ga4Property: GA4 numeric property id (Admin → Property Settings), or empty to skip GA4
ga4SaPath: C:\path\to\ga4-service-account.json (GA4 Data API SA, added as Viewer on the property)
privRepo: owner/your-board-private  (metrics.json holds sensitive business data → stored private, fetched by the board with the owner's token)
